notes: Single-channel SecureFusion event manifest example. The on-disk JSON is pretty-printed for readability; the verifier re-canonicalises (alpha-sort, no whitespace, integer-only numerics, omit-when-empty for tenantId / signerKeyId) before computing bundleHash. The expected bundleHash is also recorded in examples/test-vectors.json (which is the oracle every implementation tests against).
shape: Mirrors what FleetFusion's SecureManifestBuilder emits today: every required v1 field present, optional tenantId + signerKeyId present and non-empty, no dropped legacy fields (eventType / geo / driverId / notes / extras / role / codec / resolution).
ingestSource: fleetfusion (single-value enum in v1; see SPEC §6 Field Inventory).
